name: Sedgman Ltd
description: Sedgman is a leading provider of minerals processing and associated infrastructure solutions to the global resources industry. With decades of global critical minerals expertise, the company tackles complex challenges with precision and technical excellence. From resource to market, Sedgman delivers end-to-end solutions that accelerate project delivery while reducing risk. Backed by the financial strength of the CIMIC Group, they help clients maximize recoveries, optimize operational efficiency, and secure long-term performance across various mining projects. Their comprehensive services span engineering, project development, and operations, ensuring reliable results for the resources sector worldwide.
